requirements_met.notes: All 3 commands implemented: tests-review (test-plan vs real files gap analysis), actions-generate (GitHub Actions workflow from config), drift-check (requirements vs implementation-log diff with strict/heuristic modes)

acceptance_criteria_met.notes: AC1: devflow tests review detects coverage gaps. AC2: devflow actions generate produces valid YAML. AC3: devflow drift check detects implemented-not-documented and documented-not-implemented.

coding_standards.notes: Code follows existing command patterns in src/commands/. Uses same kernel/utils/fs helpers. TypeScript interfaces exported for pipe-safe JSON.

testing.notes: 16 unit tests cover all 3 commands. CLI integration tests blocked by pre-existing js-yaml import issue in dist. All 340 tests pass across full suite.

functionality_verification.notes: Typecheck passes (0 errors). Build succeeds. Commands registered in CLI with subcommand groups. Edge cases handled: missing test-plan, missing config, missing requirements, missing implementation-log, nonexistent features.

story_administration.notes: All 6 tasks marked [x]. File List added with created/modified files. Change Log updated with status transitions.

dependencies_build.notes: Build succeeds via tsc. No new dependencies added. Pre-existing js-yaml issue in dist (not related to this story) fixed by rebuilding.

documentation.notes: JSDoc comments on all command functions. Transitions.ts updated to integrate with devflow next. README not updated — commands are STABLE but manual alternative text still accurate.

summary: Story 4.2 implemented three PREVIEW commands: tests-review (test plan gap analysis), actions-generate (GitHub Actions workflow generation), and drift-check (semantic spec-implementation drift detection). All commands produce pipe-safe JSON, accept feature IDs, and include appropriate edge case handling. Registered in CLI, integrated with devflow next, and covered by 16 unit tests. Full test suite: 340 passed, 0 type errors.
